THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNKER, HOWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KATZ, ALEXA $3,067.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,142.00, DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO A 25% REDUCTION IN RENT (CIVIL CODE 1942.4 (B)(1) DUE TO PROVEN HABITABILITY ISSUES AT THE PREMISES FROM JANUARY THRU APRIL 2017. DEFENDANT IS ALSO ENTITLED TO $2000.00 IN RENT REDUCTION FOR HARASSMENT RELATING TO PLAINTIFF'S REPEATED VIOLATIONS OF CIVIL CODE SECTION 1954. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
